attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_ID, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.REQUEST_ID, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LEDGER_ID, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTING_DATE, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SUMMARY_BATCH_ID, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CATEGORY, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_NAME, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ENTERED_DR, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ENTERED_CR, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CURRENCY_CODE, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_DR, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_CR, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_CURRENCY_CODE, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_NUMBER, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_TYPE, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.TARGET_INSTANCE_ID, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT1, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT2, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT3, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT4, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT5, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT6, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT7, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT8, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT9, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT10, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT11, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT12, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT13, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT14, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT15, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CREATION_DATE, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CREATED_BY, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY
WHERE   SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY QTC_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID  ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
